stories.title: RenderServer adapter shape + config/options types
acceptanceCriteria: src/server/index.ts exports RenderServer(config: ServerConfig): RenderAdapter<ServerOptions> plus ServerConfig and ServerOptions types
ServerConfig has serveUrl, workDir (required), publicUrl?, concurrency? (default 2), store? (defaults to a fresh InMemoryStore)
ServerOptions has concurrency?, chromiumOptions? (from @remotion/renderer), timeoutInMilliseconds?
RenderServer(...) is assignable to RenderAdapter<ServerOptions> and plugs into new RenderSdk({ adapter }) with start options auto-typed (no `as` at the call site)
bun run types passes with 0 errors

stories.title: start: handle + store transitions + detached limited render
acceptanceCriteria: start generates a jobId, returns encodeServerHandle(jobId) immediately without awaiting the render
start writes an initial store record {status:'queued', progress:0, codec, createdAt}
the render task runs on a p-limit limiter and transitions the store queued->rendering->done across polls
renderMedia onProgress is mapped into store.update with progress clamped to 0..1
output file path is `${workDir}/${handle}.${ext}` with ext resolved from the job codec; workDir is mkdir -p'd before write
server.start.test.ts verifies handle shape + store transitions + onProgress->store with a mocked @remotion/renderer (no real Chromium)

stories.title: Concurrency bound by the limiter
acceptanceCriteria: with concurrency 1, a second job stays 'queued' while the first is 'rendering' (gated mock renderer)
releasing the first job lets the second acquire a slot and transition to 'rendering'
server.limiter.test.ts proves the bound deterministically with a controllable (deferred) mock

stories.title: getState / getUrl / download semantics
acceptanceCriteria: getState maps the record to {status, progress, error?}; unknown handle throws RenderError('not_found')
getUrl returns `${publicUrl}/${handle}.${ext}` when publicUrl is set, else bare `${handle}.${ext}`; ext from the stored codec; unknown handle -> not_found
download returns a web ReadableStream of the file via Readable.toWeb; missing record or missing file -> RenderError('not_found')
server.url.test.ts and server.download.test.ts cover both branches incl. a real temp file round-trip

stories.title: Error classification: render_failed vs version_mismatch
acceptanceCriteria: a rejected renderMedia writes store status:'error' with the error message (no unhandledRejection from the detached task)
a remotion version-mismatch-shaped error is classified as code 'version_mismatch'; other errors as 'render_failed'; the code is persisted on the record and surfaced (errorCode field)
server.error.test.ts covers both the generic failure and the simulated version error

stories.title: Build keeps remotion external + codec type-guard
acceptanceCriteria: bun run build succeeds and dist/server/index.js does not bundle @remotion/renderer (stays external)
a compile-time type-guard test asserts our Codec union is assignable to @remotion/renderer's Codec
bun test is fully green and the full suite count increased over the pre-PRD-06 baseline (39)
